title: Velvety Midnight Canadian Tomato Stir-fry
description: This high-protein-friendly dish features fresh tomatoes and tinned tomatoes in a creamy, velvety sauce with a tadka (Indian spice blend). Perfect for satisfying the midnight craving for something delicious and healthy.

ingredients.name: tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Use ripe tomatoes for better texture

ingredients.name: tinned tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Drained and crushed with a spoon

ingredients.name: tadka spices
ingredients.notes: Including mustard seeds, cumin seeds, and fenugreek seeds

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger. Cook for another minute until fragrant.
Add tinned tomatoes along with tadka spices. Bring to a simmer and let cook for 10 minutes.
Once the sauce has thickened slightly, stir in fresh chopped tomatoes. Simmer for an additional 5-7 minutes until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Season with salt and cayenne pepper if desired. Stir through to ensure all ingredients are evenly coated.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
